en.title: 12.fun
intro: This is an interactive game - music visualizer and generative art  experiment inspired by the ancient Chinese cultural system of the Twelve Zodiac Animals.

In traditional Chinese philosophy, the twelve zodiac animals represent different energies and personalities that coexist in a cyclical system of balance and regeneration. Each animal contributes its own strengths, forming a dynamic and harmonious universe.
In 12.fun, this idea is reinterpreted through generative visual art and audio-reactive animation.
en.zodiacHeading: Each zodiac animal becomes a visual system
usersCanItems: Play music directly on the site
Watch music transform into dynamic generative visuals
en.exploration: 12.fun is an exploration of music, culture, and algorithmic art, where every song creates a unique visual universe.
aboutCreatorIntro: Guan is a DJ, artist, and programmer based in Taiwan who loves playful design, generative visuals, and experimental web projects.
His work often explores the intersection of music, art, and interactive programming, creating digital experiences that feel both artistic and game-like.
en.genresLabel: As a DJ, he occasionally performs and plays genres such as:
en.aboutCreatorClosing: He is especially known for crafting long DJ sets and atmospheric musical journeys, patiently building energy and texture over time.

zh.title: 12.fun
intro: 這是一個互動遊戲，音樂視覺與生成藝術實驗，靈感來自華人文化中的十二生肖。
在傳統華人哲學裡，十二生肖代表不同的能量與性格，在循環的平衡與再生中並存。每種動物各自貢獻其特質，形成動態而和諧的整體。
在 12.fun 中，這個概念透過生成視覺藝術與聲音互動動畫重新詮釋。
zh.zodiacHeading: 每種生肖對應一套視覺系統
usersCanItems: 在網站上直接播放音樂
看著音樂即時轉化成動態的生成視覺
zh.exploration: 12.fun 探索音樂、文化與演算藝術的交會，每首歌都會生成獨一無二的視覺宇宙。
aboutCreatorIntro: Guan 是定居台灣的 DJ、藝術家與程式創作者，熱愛遊戲感設計、生成視覺與實驗性的網路作品。
他的作品常遊走音樂、藝術與互動程式的交集，創造既像藝術又像遊戲的數位體驗。
zh.genresLabel: 作為 DJ，他偶爾演出，擅長的曲風包括：
zh.aboutCreatorClosing: 他尤其以編排長時間的 DJ set 與氛圍式音樂旅程為樂趣，在時間中細膩堆疊畫面與質地。
